// // This comment suggests that the module does not handle reset properly.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input ce,
    input [31:0] din0,
    input [31:0] din1,
    output reg [31:0] dout
);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            dout <= 0;
        end else if (ce) begin
            dout <= din0 * din1;
        end
    end
endmodule
